name: Text Message Rendering
summary: Renders AI agent text messages with Markdown support, code highlighting, and inline elements
goals: Render Markdown text with syntax-highlighted code blocks
Support inline images, links, and LaTeX where applicable

specDetail.description: A MessageRenderer component that renders text messages from the AI agent. Supports full Markdown with syntax-highlighted code blocks, inline code, links, images, tables, and custom extensions.

parameters.name: streaming
parameters.description: Whether the content is still streaming (partial render)

constraints: Must render Markdown correctly including GFM extensions (tables, strikethrough, task lists)
Must apply syntax highlighting to fenced code blocks
Must sanitize HTML to prevent XSS in rendered content

acceptanceCriteria.given: an assistant message contains Markdown with code blocks
acceptanceCriteria.then: code blocks display with appropriate syntax highlighting and a copy button

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
